title: GabCraft19's RPG World
description: The perfect Minecraft RPG Modpack (in my Opinion)
body:
## GabCraft19's RPG World

Step into an epic world of adventure, magic, and medieval warfare. With over 200 mods, this pack transforms Minecraft into a full-fledged RPG experience, featuring new weapons, magic, enhanced combat, and massive medieval cities.

# Features

• Advanced Combat System – Thanks to LevelZ, you can level up your skills, while Simple Swords adds new weapons. Use blocking, parrying, and special attacks for intense battles.
	
• Build Your Own Kingdom – Construct castles and villages, defend your land with soldiers, and recruit NPCs as guards.
	
• Magic & Alchemy – Discover mystical spells, brew powerful potions, and wield magical artifacts.
	
• Realistic Economy & Professions – Become a blacksmith, hunter, alchemist, or builder, and trade with villagers.
	
• Travel by Ships & Carts – Thanks to Small Ships, you can sail the seas, and with Nifty Carts, travel across land.
	
• New Structures & Dungeons – Explore massive castles, abandoned ruins, and deep dungeons filled with treasure and danger.
	
• Epic Graphics & Performance – Experience stunning lighting and shadows with Iris Shaders, without losing FPS.
	
• Immersive Sounds & Music – Enjoy new ambient sounds and medieval music for a truly atmospheric experience.

# Become a Legend

Explore a vast world, master weapons and magic, build your own realm, and carve your name into history. Are you ready for the ultimate medieval RPG experience?
